headlines.description: — The Broncos offense has stalled all season so expectations were low when a punt left them on their 2-yard line, trailing the Jacksonville Jaguars at Wembley Stadium.
headlines.shortLinkText: Broncos beat Jaguars 21-17 in London to snap losing streak

headlines.description: — D.J. Moore hauled in a last-minute touchdown pass but ripped off his helmet, Carolina's Eddy Piñeiro missed a pair of potential winning kicks, and the Atlanta Falcons escaped with a victory that was as improbable as their spot in the standings.
headlines.shortLinkText: Koo's OT FG gives Falcons improbable 37-34 win over Panthers

headlines.description: — Dak Prescott kept his legs churning to turn a quarterback sneak into a 25-yard gain.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cowboys' Prescott, Parsons rumble to 49-29 win over Bears

headlines.description: — Tua Tagovailoa dropped back, set his feet and went through three options before finding a wide-open teammate.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tagovailoa aids Dolphins' turnaround in 31-27 win over Lions

headlines.description: — The winning touch that so often escaped the Minnesota Vikings last season is back in their hands.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vikings hang on for 5th straight win, top Cardinals 34-26

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Saints running back Alvin Kamara has his teammates' attention as he explores the bounds of his leadership in his first season wearing a captain's “C” on his jersey.
headlines.shortLinkText: Saints ride Kamara's 3 TDs, defense to 24-0 win over Raiders

events.name: New England Patriots at New York Jets

headlines.description: Bill Belichick will appreciate reaching another coaching milestone some other time. Just getting a win was all that mattered Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Belichick passes Halas, Patriots beat Jets 22-17

headlines.description: — A.J. Brown hauled in his third touchdown catch — of the first half — and the Eagles' star receiver peered through his tinted visor at two Steelers defenders knocked to the turf because of a slapstick collision on a futile attempt at breaking up the...
headlines.shortLinkText: Hurts, Brown power unbeaten Eagles past Steelers 35-13

headlines.description: — Derrick Henry was feeling it Sunday, running all over the Houston Texans like he has so many times before. At one point he turned to his rookie quarterback with a simple but pointed message.
headlines.shortLinkText: Henry runs for 219 yards, 2 TDs as Titans down Texans 17-10

events.name: San Francisco 49ers at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — Christian McCaffrey caught the backward screen pass from Jimmy Garoppolo, took a few steps and lofted a beautiful throw over...
headlines.shortLinkText: McCaffrey throws, catches, rushes for TDs, Niners rout Rams

events.name: New York Giants at Seattle Seahawks

headlines.description: — Tyler Lockett had a steady stream of visitors on the Seahawks bench — coach Pete Carroll, DK Metcalf, Quandre Diggs — all reminding the standout wide receiver he'd get another chance after two uncharacteristic mistakes.
headlines.shortLinkText: Seahawks topple Giants 27-13 to stay atop NFC West

events.name: Green Bay Packers at Buffalo Bills

headlines.description: — Bills receiver Stefon Diggs says he’s not the one who started the verbal exchange he and Packers cornerback Jaire Alexander had in the tunnel before and after pre-game warmups.
headlines.shortLinkText: Diggs, Bills hand Rodgers, Packers 4th straight loss, 27-17
